dialogue.text: One moment.
dialogue.ja: ちょっと待って。

dialogue.text: You seem to be missing something.

dialogue.text: This represents discipline.

dialogue.text: And this represents strength.

dialogue.text: You need both to reach the arrow.

dialogue.ja: 矢を射るには両方が必要だ。

dialogue.text: We've got a long way to go.

dialogue.text: Let's get down to clearness.

dialogue.text: The hunt.
dialogue.ja: 狩りだ。

dialogue.text: Did they send me daughters?

dialogue.text: I am scared for sons.
dialogue.ja: 息子たちが心配だ。

dialogue.text: Your saddest bunch I ever met.
dialogue.zh: 你們是我見過最悲傷的一群。
dialogue.ja: 今まで会った中で一番悲しい連中だ。

dialogue.text: But you can bat before and through.
dialogue.ja: でも君たちは打って進める。

dialogue.text: Mr. Isle.

dialogue.text: Make a man out of you.
dialogue.ja: 男にしてやろう。

dialogue.text: Train will have a forest.

dialogue.text: Come fire within.

dialogue.text: Once you find your centre,
dialogue.ja: 中心を見つけたら、

dialogue.text: you are sure to end.
dialogue.ja: 必ず成功する。

dialogue.text: Your spine looks pale,
dialogue.ja: 背骨が青白く見える、

dialogue.text: but they're not.
dialogue.ja: でもそうじゃない。

dialogue.text: And you haven't got a clue.
dialogue.ja: そして君は何も分かっていない。

dialogue.text: Somehow I'll make a man.
dialogue.zh: 不管怎樣我會讓你成為男子漢。
dialogue.ja: なんとかして男にしてやる。

dialogue.text: I'm not out of you.
dialogue.ja: 君を諦めない。

dialogue.text: I'm never going to catch my breath.

dialogue.text: Say goodbye to those who will never be.
dialogue.zh: 向那些永遠不會成為的人說再見。
dialogue.ja: なれない者たちにさよならを。

dialogue.text: I was at full in school for cutting jam.
dialogue.ja: 授業をサボって叱られた。

dialogue.text: Did the odds got them scared to death?
dialogue.ja: 確率が彼らを死ぬほど怖がらせたか？

dialogue.text: Hope you guys can see it right through me.
dialogue.ja: 君たちが僕を見抜けることを願う。

dialogue.text: Now I really wish that I knew how to swim.
dialogue.zh: 現在我真希望我會游泳。
dialogue.ja: 今、本当に泳げたらいいのにと思う。

dialogue.text: Your plan must be split down the course in river.

dialogue.text: With all the force of the great time for you.

dialogue.text: With all the strength of a raging fire.

dialogue.text: The story is as the dark side of the moon.

dialogue.text: Time is racing toward us.

dialogue.text: Till the heart is alive.
